title: Free Electricity Policy
policyText: Provide up to 200 units of free electricity per household for low-income families with smart-meter targeting.

title: Fuel Price Increase
policyText: Increase fuel prices to reduce fiscal pressure and redirect funds to infrastructure and public transport.

title: Job Guarantee Scheme
policyText: Urban and rural job guarantee scheme with digital attendance, local works, and skill-linked placements.

title: Scenario 0001 - Urban Strategy
policyText: Urban rental support and transit subsidy with eligibility verification. Rollout phase 2 with transparency dashboard and grievance closure SLA.
